stateUpdates.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions:
template::{{state.AgentScriptInternal_agent_instructions}}
Welcome to Revenue Cloud Pricing Configuration!

I can help you:
- Set up product pricing models
- Configure discount rules
- Calculate final pricing
- Manage approval workflows

Please provide:
- Product name
- Base price
- Discount percentage (if applicable)
